site:gladly.com developer API credentials self-serve portal
gladly customer service platform API credentials sign up developer self service trial
"gladly" "app platform" developer portal sign up register

researched_category.notes: Gladly is a customer experience AI platform providing omnichannel customer service with AI-powered automation.

one_liner.value: Gladly is a customer experience AI platform that provides omnichannel customer service (voice, chat, email, SMS, social) with AI-powered automation, designed to build customer loyalty through personalized support.
one_liner.notes: The main website and developer portal describe it as a customer experience AI platform.

methods.notes: Gladly uses token-based Basic Authentication. The API token (created in the Gladly admin UI) is passed as the password in HTTP Basic auth, with the agent email as the username. The OpenAPI spec lists 'basic' as the security scheme type.

access.notes: Gladly does not publish pricing publicly. Multiple third-party sources confirm it is quote-based with plans starting at ~$180-210/agent/month (annual contract, seat minimums). No free trial or free tier is available. API credentials require being a Gladly customer with an Administrator who enables the 'API User' permission on a per-user basis. Sandbox environments require contacting Gladly CSM or Support and likely purchasing a plan.

summary.value: Gladly has a documented public REST API with an OpenAPI specification covering agents, customers, conversations, conversation items, answers (public knowledge base), topics, organizations, and webhooks. It also supports webhook events and a Lookup API for providing external data. Chat SDKs exist for Web, iOS, and Android. The API is fairly broad, covering most customer service operations.
summary.notes: The API documentation is at developer.gladly.com/rest with full OpenAPI spec.

agent_interface.notes: No official MCP server from Gladly was found. A community CLI wrapper exists (Gladly ReadCLI by printingpress.dev) and third-party integration platforms like StackOne and Truto offer Gladly MCP connectors, but no official Gladly MCP server. Composio does not list a Gladly toolkit.

rationale.value: The Gladly REST API is well-documented, public, and reasonably broad — technically it could power an agent toolkit. However, access to API credentials requires being a paying Gladly customer (quote-based pricing starting ~$180-210/agent/month with seat minimums) AND having an Administrator enable the 'API User' permission per user. There is no self-serve free tier, trial, or developer sandbox available without purchasing a plan. This makes it gated behind a paid plan and admin approval, not freely accessible for agent toolkit development.
rationale.notes: Main blocker is the paid API entitlement — you cannot get API credentials without being a paying customer with admin permissions.

s1.quote: The only AI built for LTV. CX that drives customer devotion.
s1.title: Gladly Homepage

s2.quote: A platform with people at the heart of it. Looking to extend Gladly, use Gladly's REST APIs, receive notifications with webhooks, build an App Platform integration, or export data?
s2.title: Gladly Developer Portal

s3.quote: Gladly API uses token-based Basic Authentication. API tokens are associated with designated Gladly users. ... The credentials must be passed via an Authorization HTTP header.
s3.title: Gladly REST API Documentation

s4.quote: API tokens are required to use Gladly APIs for security and authentication purposes. Tokens can be accessed and created by users who at least have an API user role.
s4.title: Generate API Tokens and Create Webhooks

s5.quote: Gladly is priced at the very top of the customer support market. Based on customer reviews and reported quotes, pricing typically starts around $180–$210 per agent per month, billed annually.
s5.title: Gladly Pricing: Plans, Costs & Best Alternatives (2026)

s6.quote: No free version or trial is available for Gladly CX Platform.
s6.title: Gladly CX Platform Pricing 2026

s7.quote: Gladly doesn't publish prices; you have to request a quote.
s7.title: What Is Gladly? The People-Centered Customer Service Platform (2026)

s8.quote: If you do not have a sandbox environment and are interested in purchasing one, please contact your Gladly CSM or Gladly Support team.
s8.title: Setup and Testing - Sandbox Environment

s9.quote: App Platform provides the APIs, SDKs, and developer tools you need to connect your systems to Gladly across every channel.
s9.title: Gladly Developer Platform

s10.quote: Gladly Integration for AI Agents. Connect your AI agent to 65 Gladly actions via MCP, A2A, or SDK...
s10.title: StackOne - Gladly Integration for AI Agents

s11.quote: Read-first Gladly API surface for customer timelines, conversations, agents, topics, answers, and support operations.
s11.title: Gladly ReadCLI - Community CLI Tool

limitations: Pricing information is not officially published by Gladly; third-party estimates were used for cost context. The official website only presents a 'Get a demo' CTA with no pricing page.
Could not confirm any official Gladly MCP server. Only third-party providers (StackOne, Truto) offer MCP connectors for Gladly.
No free trial or self-service signup for API credentials was identified - access requires being a paying customer.
